title: CogWorks SMP
description:
REBRAND BABY!!!

CogWorks is a survival server focused on the Create and Clocwork mods! Join our discord to get whitelisted
body: CogWorks is a (relatively) peaceful and friendly survival server open to members of our discord server (link on the right). the pack is focused on Create and it's various addons, and Clockwork + Valkyrien Skies.
